name: S'more Cookie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add the egg and vanilla extract; beat well.
5. Stir together the flour, graham cracker crumbs, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
6. Add this mixture to the butter mixture, beating until fully blended.
7. Press half of the dough into the prepared pan.
8. Arrange the chocolate bars over the dough, breaking them as needed to fit.
9. Spread with marshmallow creme.
10. Scatter bits of remaining dough over the marshmallow creme.
11. Carefully press the remaining dough to form a layer on top.
12. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until lightly browned.
13. Allow to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
14. Cut into bars.
YIELD: 16 bars
